title: Develop and manage a plan for sustainable production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and manage a plan for sustainable production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop goals and objectives to improve biodiversity, recycling and sustainability

pcs.text: Establish long-term direction and purpose of the business by identifying and analysing the values, expectations and personal goals of the people involved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish long-term direction and purpose of the business by identifying and analysing the values, expectations and personal goals of the people involved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish long-term direction and purpose of the business by identifying and analysing the values, expectations and personal goals of the people involved.

pcs.text: Identify business and personal strengths, weaknesses, opportunities and threats and strategies to address them
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify business and personal strengths, weaknesses, opportunities and threats and strategies to address them?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify business and personal strengths, weaknesses, opportunities and threats and strategies to address them.

pcs.text: Investigate sources of information and support for improved practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate sources of information and support for improved practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate sources of information and support for improved practices.

pcs.text: Estimate timelines for, and costs for improved practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate timelines for, and costs for improved practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate timelines for, and costs for improved practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop goals and objectives to improve biodiversity, recycling and sustainability

elements.title: Audit the existing and natural resources on the property

pcs.text: Draw a property map to include land classes using classification terminology, fences and water systems, natural property features and infrastructure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Draw a property map to include land classes using classification terminology, fences and water systems, natural property features and infrastructure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Draw a property map to include land classes using classification terminology, fences and water systems, natural property features and infrastructure.

pcs.text: Conduct a risk assessment of previous land use and an inventory of chemicals applied or evidence of application on the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a risk assessment of previous land use and an inventory of chemicals applied or evidence of application on the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a risk assessment of previous land use and an inventory of chemicals applied or evidence of application on the site.

pcs.text: Identify areas at risk of soil degradation and develop strategies to protect the area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify areas at risk of soil degradation and develop strategies to protect the area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify areas at risk of soil degradation and develop strategies to protect the area.

pcs.text: Develop and implement strategies to improve the health and the regeneration of remnant vegetation to support a diversity of living systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement strategies to improve the health and the regeneration of remnant vegetation to support a diversity of living systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement strategies to improve the health and the regeneration of remnant vegetation to support a diversity of living systems.

pcs.text: Assess potential problem pests and weeds and use strategies to implement an eradication program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess potential problem pests and weeds and use strategies to implement an eradication program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess potential problem pests and weeds and use strategies to implement an eradication program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Audit the existing and natural resources on the property

elements.title: Develop and implement grazing and cropping strategies to improve sustainable outcomes

pcs.text: Use soil test results to make recommendations for soil improvement with appropriate organic fertilisers and soil conditioners to ensure a mineral-balanced and healthy soil
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use soil test results to make recommendations for soil improvement with appropriate organic fertilisers and soil conditioners to ensure a mineral-balanced and healthy soil?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use soil test results to make recommendations for soil improvement with appropriate organic fertilisers and soil conditioners to ensure a mineral-balanced and healthy soil.

pcs.text: Develop and implement an annual grazing program and strategies to optimise pasture growth and animal production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement an annual grazing program and strategies to optimise pasture growth and animal production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement an annual grazing program and strategies to optimise pasture growth and animal production.

pcs.text: Develop and implement a strategy for the recycling of farm waste and effluent
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement a strategy for the recycling of farm waste and effluent?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement a strategy for the recycling of farm waste and effluent.

pcs.text: Assess soil biological activity and apply suitable preparations and grazing strategies to improve the soil biota and soil organic matter
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess soil biological activity and apply suitable preparations and grazing strategies to improve the soil biota and soil organic matter?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess soil biological activity and apply suitable preparations and grazing strategies to improve the soil biota and soil organic matter.

pcs.text: Identify suitability of mulching and composting systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify suitability of mulching and composting systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify suitability of mulching and composting systems.

pcs.text: Design and implement a plan using crop rotations to optimise soil fertility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design and implement a plan using crop rotations to optimise soil fertility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design and implement a plan using crop rotations to optimise soil fertility.

pcs.text: Research the principles and application of biodynamic preparations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research the principles and application of biodynamic preparations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research the principles and application of biodynamic preparations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Develop and implement grazing and cropping strategies to improve sustainable outcomes

elements.title: Manage livestock health and welfare for improved, sustainable production

pcs.text: Plan strategies to preserve livestock health including allowable treatments and grazing management in the short term and genetic improvement in the long term
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan strategies to preserve livestock health including allowable treatments and grazing management in the short term and genetic improvement in the long term?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan strategies to preserve livestock health including allowable treatments and grazing management in the short term and genetic improvement in the long term.

pcs.text: Maintain livestock records to identify treated animals, including a record of all treatments including homeopathic remedies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain livestock records to identify treated animals, including a record of all treatments including homeopathic remedies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain livestock records to identify treated animals, including a record of all treatments including homeopathic remedies.

pcs.text: Sustain the animal enterprise with pasture and suitable fodder and maintain consumption records to meet certification protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sustain the animal enterprise with pasture and suitable fodder and maintain consumption records to meet certification protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sustain the animal enterprise with pasture and suitable fodder and maintain consumption records to meet certification protocols.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Manage livestock health and welfare for improved, sustainable production

elements.title: Manage customer feedback and satisfaction

pcs.text: Develop procedures to obtain, analyse and respond to customer feedback on farm product quality and integrity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop procedures to obtain, analyse and respond to customer feedback on farm product quality and integrity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop procedures to obtain, analyse and respond to customer feedback on farm product quality and integrity.

pcs.text: Implement procedures mange customer feedback and satisfaction with sustainable product quality and integrity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement procedures mange customer feedback and satisfaction with sustainable product quality and integrity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement procedures mange customer feedback and satisfaction with sustainable product quality and integrity.
